description_long: This is a round, textured ceramic teapot with a matte, off-white finish and a subtle reddish-brown accent around the neck and lid. The body is bulbous and slightly rough, giving it a handcrafted, rustic appearance. The spout is stout and slightly angled upward, positioned opposite a thick, looped handle that is ergonomically designed for gripping. The lid is domed with a small, rounded knob for easy removal, fitting snugly into the teapot's opening. There are faint, embossed markings or symbols on one side of the body, adding a touch of decorative detail. The overall design suggests durability and functionality, suitable for both serving and display.
description: A round, textured ceramic teapot with a matte off-white finish, reddish-brown neck accent, and a domed lid with a knob. Features a stout spout, thick loop handle, and subtle embossed markings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the spout, domed lid with knob, reddish-brown neck accent, and embossed markings on the body.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting both the spout and the thick loop handle, with the reddish-brown accent around the neck visible.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the large loop handle and the back of the lid, with the spout mostly hidden.
description_view_3: Side view showing the handle and the opposite side of the body, with the spout visible in profile and embossed markings partially visible.
attribute_spout_orientation: The spout is stout, slightly curved, and angled slightly upward, positioned at the front and offset from the main body.
attribute_handle_design: The handle is a thick, rounded loop attached at the upper and lower sides of the body, providing a sturdy and ergonomic grip.
attribute_lid_presence: Present; domed with a small, rounded knob and fits snugly.
attribute_decorative_patterns: Faint embossed markings on one side of the body; otherwise plain.
